SELECT l1.test_date, l1.patient_id, l1.notes, l1.test_name FROM lab_results AS l1 WHERE l1.is_abnormal = 0 UNION ALL SELECT l2.test_date, l2.patient_id, l2.notes, l2.test_name FROM lab_results AS l2 WHERE l2.test_date < DATETIME('now', '-24 days') ORDER BY test_date LIMIT 50

SELECT d1.is_active, d1.id, d1.floor_number FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.head_doctor_id >= 752 UNION ALL SELECT d2.is_active, d2.id, d2.floor_number FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.id = 869 ORDER BY is_active

SELECT p1.patient_id, p1.end_date, p1.is_active FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.doctor_id < 948 UNION ALL SELECT p2.patient_id, p2.end_date, p2.is_active FROM prescriptions AS p2 WHERE p2.doctor_id = 341 LIMIT 49

SELECT d1.id, d1.head_doctor_id, d1.budget, d1.is_active FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.floor_number <= 687 UNION SELECT d2.id, d2.head_doctor_id, d2.budget, d2.is_active FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.id <> 458 ORDER BY id

SELECT l1.result_value, l1.notes, l1.doctor_id FROM lab_results AS l1 WHERE l1.patient_id < 336 UNION SELECT l2.result_value, l2.notes, l2.doctor_id FROM lab_results AS l2 WHERE l2.id = 167 ORDER BY result_value

SELECT p1.doctor_id, p1.id FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.patient_id = 471 UNION ALL SELECT p2.doctor_id, p2.id FROM prescriptions AS p2 WHERE p2.medication_name = 'admin' ORDER BY doctor_id LIMIT 45

SELECT p1.id, p1.first_name, p1.gender, p1.email FROM patients AS p1 WHERE p1.insurance_id LIKE 'b%' UNION SELECT p2.id, p2.first_name, p2.gender, p2.email FROM patients AS p2 WHERE p2.insurance_provider <> 'user'
SELECT p1.dosage, p1.frequency FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.dosage <> 'admin' UNION SELECT p2.dosage, p2.frequency FROM prescriptions AS p2 WHERE p2.dosage <> 'user' LIMIT 42
SELECT d1.floor_number, d1.is_active FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.budget < 572 UNION ALL SELECT d2.floor_number, d2.is_active FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.name LIKE '%a%'
SELECT p1.start_date, p1.is_active FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.dosage LIKE '%c' UNION SELECT p2.start_date, p2.is_active FROM prescriptions AS p2 WHERE p2.frequency = 'test' LIMIT 48

SELECT d1.is_active, d1.head_doctor_id FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.floor_number <> 299 UNION SELECT d2.is_active, d2.head_doctor_id FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.head_doctor_id = 977 ORDER BY is_active
SELECT a1.doctor_id, a1.notes FROM appointments AS a1 WHERE a1.notes LIKE 'b%' UNION ALL SELECT a2.doctor_id, a2.notes FROM appointments AS a2 WHERE a2.patient_id > 224
SELECT l1.is_abnormal, l1.id FROM lab_results AS l1 WHERE l1.test_name <> 'user' UNION SELECT l2.is_abnormal, l2.id FROM lab_results AS l2 WHERE l2.id < 886 LIMIT 34

SELECT d1.is_active, d1.head_doctor_id FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.floor_number = 987 UNION ALL SELECT d2.is_active, d2.head_doctor_id FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.floor_number = 330 ORDER BY is_active

SELECT d1.hire_date, d1.last_name, d1.department FROM doctors AS d1 WHERE d1.email LIKE '%@gmail.com' UNION ALL SELECT d2.hire_date, d2.last_name, d2.department FROM doctors AS d2 WHERE d2.hire_date >= DATETIME('now', '-18 days') ORDER BY hire_date

SELECT l1.id, l1.result_value, l1.patient_id FROM lab_results AS l1 WHERE l1.result_unit <> 'admin' UNION ALL SELECT l2.id, l2.result_value, l2.patient_id FROM lab_results AS l2 WHERE l2.result_unit LIKE '%a%'

SELECT l1.result_value, l1.patient_id, l1.id FROM lab_results AS l1 WHERE l1.doctor_id >= 816 UNION SELECT l2.result_value, l2.patient_id, l2.id FROM lab_results AS l2 WHERE l2.result_unit LIKE 'b%' ORDER BY result_value

SELECT p1.doctor_id, p1.end_date, p1.frequency FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.patient_id <= 499 UNION SELECT p2.doctor_id, p2.end_date, p2.frequency FROM prescriptions AS p2 WHERE p2.patient_id > 956 ORDER BY doctor_id

SELECT a1.notes, a1.patient_id FROM appointments AS a1 WHERE a1.patient_id > 999 UNION SELECT a2.notes, a2.patient_id FROM appointments AS a2 WHERE a2.scheduled_at > DATETIME('now', '-20 days') LIMIT 26

SELECT l1.result_unit, l1.notes, l1.is_abnormal FROM lab_results AS l1 WHERE l1.patient_id = 0 UNION ALL SELECT l2.result_unit, l2.notes, l2.is_abnormal FROM lab_results AS l2 WHERE l2.doctor_id <> 321

SELECT p1.doctor_id, p1.patient_id, p1.end_date FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.doctor_id = 677 UNION SELECT p2.doctor_id, p2.patient_id, p2.end_date FROM prescriptions AS p2 WHERE p2.start_date > DATETIME('now', '-30 days')

SELECT p1.id, p1.date_of_birth, p1.last_name, p1.phone_number FROM patients AS p1 WHERE p1.first_name <> 'admin' UNION ALL SELECT p2.id, p2.date_of_birth, p2.last_name, p2.phone_number FROM patients AS p2 WHERE p2.gender <> '123'

SELECT l1.result_unit, l1.doctor_id FROM lab_results AS l1 WHERE l1.is_abnormal = 1 UNION ALL SELECT l2.result_unit, l2.doctor_id FROM lab_results AS l2 WHERE l2.is_abnormal = 1 ORDER BY result_unit LIMIT 50

SELECT p1.patient_id, p1.doctor_id, p1.end_date, p1.frequency FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.dosage <> 'admin' UNION ALL SELECT p2.patient_id, p2.doctor_id, p2.end_date, p2.frequency FROM prescriptions AS p2 WHERE p2.end_date <= DATETIME('now', '-28 days')

SELECT a1.duration_minutes, a1.doctor_id, a1.id FROM appointments AS a1 WHERE a1.status = 'user' UNION ALL SELECT a2.duration_minutes, a2.doctor_id, a2.id FROM appointments AS a2 WHERE a2.status LIKE '%a%' ORDER BY duration_minutes

SELECT l1.result_unit, l1.id, l1.test_name, l1.result_value FROM lab_results AS l1 WHERE l1.result_value < 280 UNION SELECT l2.result_unit, l2.id, l2.test_name, l2.result_value FROM lab_results AS l2 WHERE l2.id < 929 ORDER BY result_unit

SELECT p1.is_active, p1.phone_number, p1.insurance_id FROM patients AS p1 WHERE p1.insurance_id LIKE '%a%' UNION ALL SELECT p2.is_active, p2.phone_number, p2.insurance_id FROM patients AS p2 WHERE p2.email <> 'user82@example.com' LIMIT 36

SELECT p1.end_date, p1.patient_id, p1.id FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.end_date < DATETIME('now', '-7 days') UNION ALL SELECT p2.end_date, p2.patient_id, p2.id FROM prescriptions AS p2 WHERE p2.end_date >= DATETIME('now', '-29 days') ORDER BY end_date

SELECT a1.notes, a1.id, a1.doctor_id, a1.scheduled_at FROM appointments AS a1 WHERE a1.duration_minutes <= 804 UNION SELECT a2.notes, a2.id, a2.doctor_id, a2.scheduled_at FROM appointments AS a2 WHERE a2.id >= 641 LIMIT 15

SELECT l1.result_unit, l1.result_value, l1.patient_id FROM lab_results AS l1 WHERE l1.patient_id <> 698 UNION SELECT l2.result_unit, l2.result_value, l2.patient_id FROM lab_results AS l2 WHERE l2.is_abnormal = 0

SELECT a1.doctor_id, a1.notes, a1.patient_id, a1.created_at FROM appointments AS a1 WHERE a1.doctor_id > 182 UNION SELECT a2.doctor_id, a2.notes, a2.patient_id, a2.created_at FROM appointments AS a2 WHERE a2.notes LIKE 'b%'

SELECT a1.patient_id, a1.notes, a1.id, a1.status FROM appointments AS a1 WHERE a1.created_at <= DATETIME('now', '-28 days') UNION SELECT a2.patient_id, a2.notes, a2.id, a2.status FROM appointments AS a2 WHERE a2.duration_minutes = 55
SELECT d1.budget, d1.floor_number FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.floor_number < 638 UNION SELECT d2.budget, d2.floor_number FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.id < 232 ORDER BY budget

SELECT d1.specialization, d1.first_name, d1.id FROM doctors AS d1 WHERE d1.last_name LIKE '%c' UNION ALL SELECT d2.specialization, d2.first_name, d2.id FROM doctors AS d2 WHERE d2.department = 'admin' ORDER BY specialization LIMIT 11

SELECT p1.id, p1.insurance_provider, p1.is_active FROM patients AS p1 WHERE p1.phone_number LIKE 'b%' UNION SELECT p2.id, p2.insurance_provider, p2.is_active FROM patients AS p2 WHERE p2.insurance_provider <> '123' LIMIT 31
SELECT a1.notes, a1.status FROM appointments AS a1 WHERE a1.patient_id > 571 UNION SELECT a2.notes, a2.status FROM appointments AS a2 WHERE a2.doctor_id <> 324 ORDER BY notes
SELECT p1.id, p1.last_name FROM patients AS p1 WHERE p1.first_name LIKE '%a%' UNION ALL SELECT p2.id, p2.last_name FROM patients AS p2 WHERE p2.admitted_on < DATETIME('now', '-8 days') ORDER BY id

SELECT p1.is_active, p1.frequency, p1.dosage, p1.patient_id FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.dosage = 'activity' UNION SELECT p2.is_active, p2.frequency, p2.dosage, p2.patient_id FROM prescriptions AS p2 WHERE p2.frequency <> '123' LIMIT 22

SELECT d1.specialization, d1.first_name, d1.id FROM doctors AS d1 WHERE d1.specialization LIKE '%c' UNION SELECT d2.specialization, d2.first_name, d2.id FROM doctors AS d2 WHERE d2.department = '123' LIMIT 50

SELECT l1.patient_id, l1.id, l1.test_date, l1.result_value FROM lab_results AS l1 WHERE l1.is_abnormal = 0 UNION ALL SELECT l2.patient_id, l2.id, l2.test_date, l2.result_value FROM lab_results AS l2 WHERE l2.result_value = 864 ORDER BY patient_id
SELECT l1.id, l1.notes FROM lab_results AS l1 WHERE l1.result_value < 251 UNION SELECT l2.id, l2.notes FROM lab_results AS l2 WHERE l2.result_value < 654

SELECT p1.medication_name, p1.patient_id FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.frequency <> 'test' UNION SELECT p2.medication_name, p2.patient_id FROM prescriptions AS p2 WHERE p2.start_date < DATETIME('now', '-25 days')

SELECT p1.first_name, p1.last_name, p1.insurance_id FROM patients AS p1 WHERE p1.email <> 'user43@example.com' UNION SELECT p2.first_name, p2.last_name, p2.insurance_id FROM patients AS p2 WHERE p2.insurance_id LIKE 'b%'
SELECT d1.specialization, d1.first_name FROM doctors AS d1 WHERE d1.id <> 262 UNION SELECT d2.specialization, d2.first_name FROM doctors AS d2 WHERE d2.last_name LIKE '%c' ORDER BY specialization

SELECT p1.is_active, p1.dosage, p1.doctor_id, p1.end_date FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.is_active = 0 UNION SELECT p2.is_active, p2.dosage, p2.doctor_id, p2.end_date FROM prescriptions AS p2 WHERE p2.id > 566 ORDER BY is_active
SELECT p1.id, p1.end_date FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.dosage = 'admin' UNION ALL SELECT p2.id, p2.end_date FROM prescriptions AS p2 WHERE p2.doctor_id < 85 ORDER BY id
SELECT p1.doctor_id, p1.frequency FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.dosage LIKE '%a%' UNION SELECT p2.doctor_id, p2.frequency FROM prescriptions AS p2 WHERE p2.frequency <> 'test'

SELECT l1.patient_id, l1.id, l1.is_abnormal, l1.doctor_id FROM lab_results AS l1 WHERE l1.test_date < DATETIME('now', '-13 days') UNION SELECT l2.patient_id, l2.id, l2.is_abnormal, l2.doctor_id FROM lab_results AS l2 WHERE l2.is_abnormal = 1 LIMIT 29

SELECT p1.end_date, p1.start_date FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.doctor_id >= 386 UNION SELECT p2.end_date, p2.start_date FROM prescriptions AS p2 WHERE p2.end_date > DATETIME('now', '-19 days') ORDER BY end_date

SELECT p1.patient_id, p1.dosage, p1.frequency, p1.end_date FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.patient_id = 686 UNION SELECT p2.patient_id, p2.dosage, p2.frequency, p2.end_date FROM prescriptions AS p2 WHERE p2.frequency LIKE 'b%'
